---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the starter, tooling, or workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What is missing or awkward today?

## Proposed idea

Describe the improvement you would like to see.

## Why it matters

Explain how it would help the wiki stay more useful, safer, or easier to maintain.

## Extra context

Links, examples, or related tools are welcome.
